name: eots_advanced_commands_en
queries: If there is any vessel near the left red lighthouse, automatically find it and keep tracking it.
Scan the entire coastline and automatically focus tracking on any vessel you detect.
Continuously monitor this area and notify me immediately when any object appears.
Find a target near the breakwater and report its exact coordinates.
Perform full-area surveillance and continuously track the most suspicious target.
Check if there are multiple objects in the current view and prioritize observing the closest one.
Perform long-range surveillance and automatically stabilize the image when necessary.
Search for targets in this area and keep tracking the first one you detect.
When an object of interest is detected, automatically capture a snapshot.
Patrol the lighthouse area and automatically start recording when movement is detected.
